consumption-ack.reason: pi wakes via sendUserMessage (fire-and-forget in wake.ts deliverWake); no native per-delivery consumption confirm — the backstop chain (PollBackstop dedup-aware re-delivery + claim_message + ack_message-on-action) yields at-least-once-with-dedup, not exactly-once-at-the-LLM.

tools-list-changed-honored.reason: pi registers Hub tools natively (tool-bridge PiToolActuator.converge) and re-converges on tool-surface revision drift (HCAP control-plane reconcile on the heartbeat tick), so a mid-session tool-surface change is honored without a restart (contrast claude bug-203).

notification-coalescer.reason: pi binds the DispatcherNotificationHooks directly (wake.ts buildPiNotificationHooks) with no coalescer; pacing comes from the native idle-gate + PollBackstop dedup.
